name: coc-keeper
description: Call of Cthulhu Keeper mode plugin for Codex with structured rules, persistent campaign state, and playtest reporting.

interface.shortDescription: Run Call of Cthulhu campaigns inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: COC Keeper adds an explicit Codex mode for immersive Call of Cthulhu play, structured rules lookup, JSON campaign state, reusable investigators, module indexing, and automated playtest reports.
